title: [Critical] Unresolved Google Bugs Leak
description_snippet:
**Summary:** [Critical] Unresolved Google Bugs Leak

**Program:** Google VRP

**Vulnerability type:** Other

### Details

**Vulnerability Description**
Issue child (say 2) marked as duplicate of issue parent(say 1), parent issue 1 is still unresolved but after 14 weeks issue 2 became public with poc
